hero.heading: PREDICT.WIN.CONQUER.
hero.subtitle: The official prediction platform for FIFA World Cup 2026. 48 nations, 12 groups, 104 matches. Predict, climb the rankings and earn real {token} tokens on Solana blockchain.

predictions.heading: CHOOSE. PREDICT. WIN.
predictions.subtitle: 72 group stage matches. 48 nations. 12 groups. Every correct prediction earns you {token} tokens. Connect your wallet and start winning now.
predictions.knockoutNote: Select one group to filter matches. The knockout stage (Round of 32, Round of 16, Quarter-finals, Semi-finals, Final) go activate when the tournament start.

ranking.heading: TOP PREDICTORS
ranking.subtitle: The best World Cup predictors go collect exclusive {token} rewards. Climb the rankings and grab first position.

token.heading: $MUNDIAL
token.subtitle: The token wey dey join football passion with the power of Solana blockchain. Dey available now for pump.fun.

security.title: Security wey Dey Auditable
security.description: Contracts wey people fit verify for Solana. No rug pulls, no honeypots. Full transparency for every transaction.

community.title: Global Community
community.description: 800M+ people wey dey connected by football passion. The token wey dey unite the world through sport.

deflationary.title: Deflationary
deflationary.description: Buy & burn mechanism with every prediction. The more people play, the more scarce the token dey.

steps.title: Connect Wallet
steps.description: Link your Solana wallet (Phantom or Solflare) securely.

steps.title: Predict Matches
steps.description: Choose the winner, draw or top scorer. Collect points for every correct pick.

steps.title: Climb Rankings
steps.description: Compete against thousands of predictors. The best go chop massive rewards.

steps.title: Claim Tokens
steps.description: Convert your points into real $MUNDIAL. The better you be, the more you go make.

footer.brand: The World Cup prediction platform where football passion meet Solana power. Predict, win and conquer.
